## Description

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots if available.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 15.3, Windows 11)
- **Ableton Live version:** (e.g., Live 12.1)
- **Python version:** (e.g., 3.12.2)
- **AI client:** (e.g., Cursor 0.48, Claude Desktop 1.2)
- **Ableton Live MCP version:** (e.g., 0.1.0 or commit hash)

## Additional context

Any other relevant information.
